name: People of the Springs Orgy
description: Is it lore accurate that the People of the Springs hold daily orgies to pay tribute to a fertility goddess? No. Is it my new headcanon? Hell yeah. (I'd intended for this to be just a Mualani bot, but I added 30+ NPCs from the village too for authenticity.) Artist: REA https://www.pixiv.net/en/users/69961370
creator: billyboy7372
